description: Question with no relevant KB — draft should honestly acknowledge and defer

chunks.content: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items with original tags attached.
We offer standard shipping (3-5 business days) and expedited shipping (1-2 business days) to all 50 states.

inputs.customerMessage: Do you ship to Australia? I'm visiting the US next month and would love to place an order while I'm home.

mustDo: Acknowledge that the reply-writer does not currently have information about international shipping
Say that someone will follow up (or that they will find out and get back to the customer)
mustAvoid: Fabricate an international shipping policy (rates, carriers, timelines)
Claim Northwind does or does not ship internationally without KB support
Pad with filler that doesn't answer the question
Redirect the customer to a different support channel or email address
